findings.title: Updater near-miss: descriptor reuse via dup2 TOCTOU race achieved, secondary hash check blocks trust bypass
findings.statement: heap-analysis Phase 6 descriptor bypass: strace showed the signature verification fd is pre-opened and subject to a dup2 race. The 5ms window between sig-check read completion and package fd consumption is usable. Descriptor-reuse achieved via dup2 during the window. Trust-bypass blocked: the forged package fails a secondary hash check after the fd swap that was not visible in the initial decompilation.

evidence.summary: debug_gdb_commands: breakpoints on cache write path confirm heap overflow and adjacent cache_entry size corruption
heap-analysis Phase 6: strace confirmed pre-opened sig-verification fd subject to dup2 race with 5ms window; descriptor-reuse achieved
Secondary hash check after fd swap rejects forged package — trust-bypass objective blocked
